```{=html}
<!-- case_when() - creating new column based on conditions -->
<script>
window.CW_DATA = [
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '3750'],
  ['Adelie',    'Biscoe',    '3800'],
  ['Adelie',    'Dream',     '4750'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '5000']
];
window.CW_COLS = ['species', 'island', 'body_mass_g'];
// Which rows match which condition: [cond1, cond2]
// Condition 1: body_mass_g > 4500 (rows 2, 3)
// Condition 2: body_mass_g < 4500 (rows 0, 1)
window.CW_MATCHES = [
  [false, false, true, true],   // > 4500
  [true, true, false, false]    // < 4500
];
window.CW_LABELS = ['Large', 'Small'];
window.CW_COND_COLORS = ['#e8853a', '#4a86c5'];
</script>
```

::: {.cw-stage-wrap}
<div id="cw-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .cw-frag id="cw-cond-1"}
[]{.fragment .cw-frag id="cw-cond-2"}
[]{.fragment .cw-frag id="cw-result"}
[]{.fragment .cw-frag id="cw-highlight-new"}
